title: Sanity Document
description: Base schema for a Sanity Content Lake document. All documents in Content Lake include system-managed underscore-prefixed fields.

_id.description: Unique document identifier. Drafts are prefixed with 'drafts.'

_type.description: Document type identifier matching the schema definition

_rev.description: Revision identifier, updated on each mutation

_updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last document update
